items.title: Bitcoin falls with ether, solana while decred, AI-linked tokens advance
items.whyYouShouldCare: The decline in major cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ether, alongside Solana, signals a potential shift in market sentiment that could impact SOL's liquidity.

items.title: Morgan Stanley applies for OCC bank charter to custody crypto
items.whyYouShouldCare: Morgan Stanley's move to secure a bank charter for crypto custody could enhance institutional confidence in the ecosystem, potentially benefiting Solana's positioning.

items.title: Magic Eden Pulls Plug on Bitcoin and Ethereum Support, Doubles Down on Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: Magic Eden's decision to focus solely on Solana may strengthen its ecosystem by driving more user engagement and liquidity towards SOL-based applications.
